response.text:

rationale: r4c5 is on the distrusted_peers list and your conservative sharing policy with 0.5 SoC threshold means you cannot spare 0.5 kWh when facing imminent blackout risk yourself—prioritize securing your own supply from r2c4 immediately.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r0c0', 'r1c3', 'r3c3', 'r4c5'].
Your latest belief: r2c4 is my only reliable energy source; all other peers are either distrusted or in survival mode themselves. I must receive energy immediately or face blackout within 17 minutes..
